<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Dashboard de Criativos — Aiqfome · Maio 2026</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --rl-black:#17191C;--rl-white:#FFFFFF;
  --rl-violet:#7A53CA;--rl-blue:#6592FF;
  --rl-gray-dk:#696A6B;--rl-gray-lt:#F5F5F7;
  --rl-pink:#FF6C8E;--rl-teal:#72EAE1;--rl-amber:#E8924A;
  --rl-grad:linear-gradient(135deg,#7A53CA 0%,#6592FF 55%,#72EAE1 100%);
  --rl-radius:10px;--rl-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(23,25,28,0.08);
}
body{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;background:var(--rl-gray-lt);color:var(--rl-black);font-size:13px;min-height:100vh}

/* HEADER */
.header{background:var(--rl-black);color:var(--rl-white);padding:28px 48px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.header::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;width:360px;background:var(--rl-grad);opacity:.12;clip-path:polygon(18% 0%,100% 0%,100% 100%,0% 100%)}
.header-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px}
.logo-box{width:36px;height:36px;background:var(--rl-white);border-radius:6px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;color:var(--rl-black);flex-shrink:0}
.brand-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)}
.grad-text{background:var(--rl-grad);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.header-meta{text-align:right;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);line-height:1.7}
.header-meta strong{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-weight:600;font-size:12px}

/* GRAD BAR */
.grad-bar{height:3px;background:var(--rl-grad)}

/* MAIN */
.main{max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto;padding:32px}

/* SECTION TITLE */
.section-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.section-title::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(122,83,202,.25) 0%,transparent 100%)}

/* KPI GRID */
.kpi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:14px;margin-bottom:28px}
@media(max-width:1100px){.kpi-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
@media(max-width:640px){.kpi-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.kpi-card{background:var(--rl-white);border-radius:var(--rl-radius);padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:var(--rl-shadow);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.kpi-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--rl-grad);border-radius:var(--rl-radius) var(--rl-radius) 0 0}
.kpi-label{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);margin-bottom:8px}
.kpi-value{font-size:26px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-1px;line-height:1;color:var(--rl-black)}
.kpi-value.violet{color:var(--rl-violet)}.kpi-value.blue{color:var(--rl-blue)}.kpi-value.teal{color:#1db8ad}
.kpi-suffix{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);margin-top:4px}
.kpi-icon{position:absolute;bottom:10px;right:12px;font-size:22px;opacity:.07}

/* CHARTS */
.charts-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1.2fr;gap:16px;margin-bottom:28px}
@media(max-width:900px){.charts-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.chart-card{background:var(--rl-white);border-radius:var(--rl-radius);padding:22px 24px;box-shadow:var(--rl-shadow);position:relative}
.chart-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--rl-grad);border-radius:var(--rl-radius) var(--rl-radius) 0 0}
.chart-card h3{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);margin-bottom:16px}
.chart-wrap{position:relative;height:220px}
.metric-toggle{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.toggle-btn{padding:4px 12px;border-radius:20px;border:1.5px solid transparent;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--rl-gray-lt);color:var(--rl-gray-dk)}
.toggle-btn.active-purchases{border-color:var(--rl-violet);color:var(--rl-violet);background:#F7F3FF}
.toggle-btn.active-cliques{border-color:var(--rl-blue);color:var(--rl-blue);background:#EFF3FF}
.toggle-btn.active-impressoes{border-color:var(--rl-teal);color:#1db8ad;background:#EDFBFA}

/* TABLE */
.table-card{background:var(--rl-white);border-radius:var(--rl-radius);box-shadow:var(--rl-shadow);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:28px;position:relative}
.table-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--rl-grad);border-radius:var(--rl-radius) var(--rl-radius) 0 0;z-index:1}
.table-header{padding:18px 24px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px}
.table-header h3{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk)}
.search-box{padding:6px 12px;border:1.5px solid #E8E8EA;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;color:var(--rl-black);outline:none;width:200px;transition:border-color .2s}
.search-box:focus{border-color:var(--rl-violet)}
.table-wrap{overflow-x:auto}
table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px}
thead th{padding:10px 14px;text-align:left;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);background:#FAFAFA;border-bottom:1px solid #EFEFEF;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;white-space:nowrap}
thead th:hover{color:var(--rl-violet)}
thead th.sorted{color:var(--rl-violet)}
tbody tr{border-bottom:1px solid #F3F3F5;transition:background .15s}
tbody tr:hover{background:#FAFBFF}
tbody tr:last-child{border-bottom:none}
td{padding:10px 14px;vertical-align:middle}

/* THUMBNAIL CELL */
.thumb-cell{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.thumb-wrap{width:64px;height:44px;flex-shrink:0;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;background:#F0F0F2;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1px solid #EBEBED;cursor:pointer;position:relative}
.thumb-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain}
.thumb-placeholder{font-size:18px;opacity:.3}
.creative-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--rl-black);max-width:220px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.creative-dim{font-size:10px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);margin-top:2px}

/* LIGHTBOX */
.lightbox{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(23,25,28,.85);z-index:999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
.lightbox.open{display:flex}
.lightbox-inner{position:relative;max-width:90vw;max-height:90vh;background:var(--rl-white);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.lightbox-inner img{display:block;max-width:80vw;max-height:80vh;object-fit:contain}
.lightbox-name{padding:10px 16px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);background:#FAFAFA;border-top:1px solid #EFEFEF}
.lightbox-close{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(23,25,28,.6);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}

/* NUM / BADGE */
.num-cell{text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-weight:500}
.badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700}
.badge-teal{background:#EDFBFA;color:#1db8ad}.badge-violet{background:#F7F3FF;color:var(--rl-violet)}
.badge-blue{background:#EFF3FF;color:var(--rl-blue)}.badge-pink{background:#FFF0F4;color:var(--rl-pink)}
.badge-amber{background:#FFF5EB;color:var(--rl-amber)}.badge-gray{background:#F0F0F2;color:var(--rl-gray-dk)}
.rank-dot{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;color:var(--rl-white);background:var(--rl-grad)}
.rank-dot.gray{background:#E8E8EA;color:var(--rl-gray-dk)}
.bar-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.bar-bg{flex:1;height:5px;background:#F0F0F2;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;background:var(--rl-grad);transition:width .6s ease}

/* PAGINATION */
.pagination{padding:12px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid #F0F0F2;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.page-info{font-size:11px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk)}
.page-btns{display:flex;gap:6px}
.page-btn{padding:4px 12px;border:1.5px solid #E8E8EA;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;background:var(--rl-white);color:var(--rl-black);transition:all .15s}
.page-btn:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:var(--rl-violet);color:var(--rl-violet)}
.page-btn:disabled{opacity:.35;cursor:default}

/* FOOTER */
.footer{background:var(--rl-black);padding:16px 48px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px}
.footer-date{color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);font-size:10px}

/* NO-IMAGE badge */
.no-img{font-size:9px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);background:#F5F5F7;border-radius:4px;padding:2px 5px;white-space:nowrap}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="header">
  <div class="header-inner">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px">
      <div class="logo-box">R/</div>
      <div>
        <div class="brand-name">Rocket Lab</div>
        <h1 style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.5px">Dashboard de <span class="grad-text">Criativos</span></h1>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="header-meta">
      <strong>Aiqfome</strong><br>
      Maio 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; 01/05 → 26/05<br>
      98 criativos &nbsp;·&nbsp; 26 dias
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="grad-bar"></div>

<div class="main">

  <!-- KPIs -->
  <div class="section-title">Resumo do período</div>
  <div class="kpi-grid">
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-label">Impressões</div>
      <div class="kpi-value">3,03M</div>
      <div class="kpi-suffix">total do período</div>
      <div class="kpi-icon">👁</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-label">Cliques</div>
      <div class="kpi-value blue">104,5K</div>
      <div class="kpi-suffix">total do período</div>
      <div class="kpi-icon">🖱</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-label">Instalações</div>
      <div class="kpi-value">304</div>
      <div class="kpi-suffix">total do período</div>
      <div class="kpi-icon">📲</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-label">Purchases</div>
      <div class="kpi-value violet">38,2K</div>
      <div class="kpi-suffix">total do período</div>
      <div class="kpi-icon">🛒</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-label">CTR Médio</div>
      <div class="kpi-value teal">3,44<span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600">%</span></div>
      <div class="kpi-suffix">cliques / impressões</div>
      <div class="kpi-icon">📊</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-label">CVR Médio</div>
      <div class="kpi-value violet">36,6<span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600">%</span></div>
      <div class="kpi-suffix">purchases / cliques</div>
      <div class="kpi-icon">🎯</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CHARTS -->
  <div class="section-title">Evolução diária</div>
  <div class="charts-row">
    <div class="chart-card">
      <h3>Tendência por métrica</h3>
      <div class="metric-toggle">
        <button class="toggle-btn active-purchases" onclick="toggleMetric('purchases',this)">Purchases</button>
        <button class="toggle-btn active-cliques"   onclick="toggleMetric('cliques',this)">Cliques</button>
        <button class="toggle-btn active-impressoes" onclick="toggleMetric('impressoes',this)">Impressões</button>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-wrap"><canvas id="lineChart"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <div class="chart-card">
      <h3>Top 8 por Purchases</h3>
      <div class="chart-wrap"><canvas id="barChart"></canvas></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TABLE -->
  <div class="section-title">Ranking de criativos</div>
  <div class="table-card">
    <div class="table-header">
      <h3>Top 20 criativos · ordenado por purchases</h3>
      <input type="text" class="search-box" placeholder="🔍  Buscar criativo..." id="searchInput" oninput="filterTable()">
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table id="creativesTable">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th style="width:36px">#</th>
            <th onclick="sortTable('name')">Criativo ↕</th>
            <th onclick="sortTable('impressoes')" class="num-cell">Impressões ↕</th>
            <th onclick="sortTable('cliques')" class="num-cell">Cliques ↕</th>
            <th onclick="sortTable('instalacoes')" class="num-cell">Instalações ↕</th>
            <th onclick="sortTable('purchases')" class="sorted num-cell">Purchases ↓</th>
            <th onclick="sortTable('ctr')" class="num-cell">CTR % ↕</th>
            <th onclick="sortTable('cvr')" class="num-cell">CVR % ↕</th>
            <th style="min-width:90px">Share</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="tableBody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
    <div class="pagination">
      <div class="page-info" id="pageInfo"></div>
      <div class="page-btns">
        <button class="page-btn" id="prevBtn" onclick="changePage(-1)">← Anterior</button>
        <button class="page-btn" id="nextBtn" onclick="changePage(1)">Próxima →</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox(event)">
  <div class="lightbox-inner">
    <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightbox()">✕</button>
    <img id="lightboxImg" src="" alt="">
    <div class="lightbox-name" id="lightboxName"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="grad-bar"></div>
<div class="footer">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
    <div class="logo-box" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:11px">R/</div>
    <span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:11px">Rocket Lab · Análise de Criativos</span>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-date">Aiqfome · Maio 2026 · Gerado em 27/05/2026</div>
</div>

<script>
// IMAGE MAP
const IMAGES = {
  'Cupom Sensacional - MKT-91030 375x667.png': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Brownie 320x480': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Brownie 320x50': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Marmita 320x50': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  '320X50': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Cupom Sensacional - MKT-91030 320x50.png': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Cupom Sensacional - MKT-91030 480x320.png': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Cupom Sensacional - MKT-91030 728x90.png': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Pizza 320x50.png': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Até 40% Off - 320x480.png': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Cupom 40%Off - 320x50.png': 'data:image/png;base64,',
  'Cupom 40%Off - 300x250.png': 'data:image/png;base64,'
};

// DATA
const DATA = {"totals":{"impressoes":3032548,"cliques":104462,"instalacoes":304,"purchases":38248,"ctr":3.44,"cvr":36.61},"top_creatives":[{"name":"Cupom 50%Off - 320X480.jpg","impressoes":334631,"cliques":46558,"instalacoes":92,"purchases":13255,"ctr":13.91,"cvr":28.47},{"name":"Cupom 50%Off - 320X50.jpg","impressoes":920070,"cliques":5777,"instalacoes":60,"purchases":5733,"ctr":0.63,"cvr":99.24},{"name":"Cupom PraVC - 320x480.png","impressoes":40,"cliques":7,"instalacoes":11,"purchases":2319,"ctr":17.5,"cvr":33128.57},{"name":"Cupom 50%Off - 300X250.jpg","impressoes":206158,"cliques":1512,"instalacoes":13,"purchases":1846,"ctr":0.73,"cvr":122.09},{"name":"Até 40% Off - 320x480.png","impressoes":45,"cliques":9,"instalacoes":11,"purchases":1841,"ctr":20,"cvr":20455.56},{"name":"Cupom PraVC - 320x50.png","impressoes":18,"cliques":1,"instalacoes":3,"purchases":1569,"ctr":5.56,"cvr":156900},{"name":"Cupom 40%Off - 320x50.png","impressoes":4,"cliques":0,"instalacoes":7,"purchases":1511,"ctr":0,"cvr":0},{"name":"Cupom 50%Off - 728x90.jpg","impressoes":195883,"cliques":2810,"instalacoes":9,"purchases":1285,"ctr":1.43,"cvr":45.73},{"name":"Cupom PraVC - 480x320.png","impressoes":12,"cliques":3,"instalacoes":8,"purchases":1084,"ctr":25,"cvr":36133.33},{"name":"Cupom 40%Off - 300x250.png","impressoes":15,"cliques":1,"instalacoes":0,"purchases":777,"ctr":6.67,"cvr":77700},{"name":"Cupom Sensacional - MKT-91030 375x667.png","impressoes":57503,"cliques":10800,"instalacoes":10,"purchases":706,"ctr":18.78,"cvr":6.54},{"name":"Brownie 320x480","impressoes":71450,"cliques":9466,"instalacoes":9,"purchases":703,"ctr":13.25,"cvr":7.43},{"name":"Cupom - PraVC - 728x90.png","impressoes":3,"cliques":0,"instalacoes":0,"purchases":485,"ctr":0,"cvr":0},{"name":"Brownie 320x50","impressoes":196951,"cliques":1473,"instalacoes":13,"purchases":469,"ctr":0.75,"cvr":31.84},{"name":"Marmita 320x50","impressoes":138097,"cliques":963,"instalacoes":9,"purchases":403,"ctr":0.7,"cvr":41.85},{"name":"320X50","impressoes":168489,"cliques":1159,"instalacoes":7,"purchases":401,"ctr":0.69,"cvr":34.6},{"name":"Cupom Sensacional - MKT-91030 320x50.png","impressoes":129614,"cliques":816,"instalacoes":4,"purchases":318,"ctr":0.63,"cvr":38.97},{"name":"Cupom Sensacional - MKT-91030 480x320.png","impressoes":44250,"cliques":3948,"instalacoes":6,"purchases":300,"ctr":8.92,"cvr":7.6},{"name":"Cupom Sensacional - MKT-91030 728x90.png","impressoes":65841,"cliques":1415,"instalacoes":2,"purchases":240,"ctr":2.15,"cvr":16.96},{"name":"Pizza 320x50.png","impressoes":85745,"cliques":586,"instalacoes":4,"purchases":220,"ctr":0.68,"cvr":37.54}],"daily":[{"date":"2026-05-01","impressoes":147954,"cliques":6124,"purchases":2086},{"date":"2026-05-02","impressoes":160489,"cliques":6106,"purchases":1773},{"date":"2026-05-03","impressoes":165054,"cliques":6939,"purchases":1642},{"date":"2026-05-04","impressoes":135496,"cliques":5549,"purchases":813},{"date":"2026-05-05","impressoes":140546,"cliques":4980,"purchases":1046},{"date":"2026-05-06","impressoes":118065,"cliques":3170,"purchases":1012},{"date":"2026-05-07","impressoes":111912,"cliques":3181,"purchases":1424},{"date":"2026-05-08","impressoes":102811,"cliques":2894,"purchases":1933},{"date":"2026-05-09","impressoes":116684,"cliques":3622,"purchases":2209},{"date":"2026-05-10","impressoes":126849,"cliques":3525,"purchases":1892},{"date":"2026-05-11","impressoes":101916,"cliques":3054,"purchases":880},{"date":"2026-05-12","impressoes":101573,"cliques":2846,"purchases":961},{"date":"2026-05-13","impressoes":111159,"cliques":3072,"purchases":987},{"date":"2026-05-14","impressoes":113549,"cliques":3244,"purchases":1062},{"date":"2026-05-15","impressoes":113924,"cliques":3802,"purchases":1789},{"date":"2026-05-16","impressoes":127419,"cliques":3845,"purchases":2244},{"date":"2026-05-17","impressoes":131538,"cliques":4394,"purchases":2168},{"date":"2026-05-18","impressoes":102971,"cliques":3375,"purchases":878},{"date":"2026-05-19","impressoes":103251,"cliques":3662,"purchases":969},{"date":"2026-05-20","impressoes":97555,"cliques":3340,"purchases":1196},{"date":"2026-05-21","impressoes":98283,"cliques":3522,"purchases":1335},{"date":"2026-05-22","impressoes":100336,"cliques":3714,"purchases":1790},{"date":"2026-05-23","impressoes":110580,"cliques":4371,"purchases":2215},{"date":"2026-05-24","impressoes":111836,"cliques":4694,"purchases":2031},{"date":"2026-05-25","impressoes":88494,"cliques":3846,"purchases":898},{"date":"2026-05-26","impressoes":92304,"cliques":3591,"purchases":1015}]};

// LIGHTBOX
function openLightbox(src, name) {
  document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src = src;
  document.getElementById('lightboxName').textContent = name;
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
}
function closeLightbox(e) {
  if (!e || e.target === document.getElementById('lightbox') || e.currentTarget.tagName === 'BUTTON') {
    document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
  }
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if(e.key==='Escape') closeLightbox({target:document.getElementById('lightbox')}); });

// LINE CHART
const activeMetrics = { purchases: true, cliques: true, impressoes: true };
let lineChart = null;
function fmt(n){ if(n>=1e6)return(n/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M'; if(n>=1e3)return(n/1e3).toFixed(1)+'K'; return n.toLocaleString('pt-BR'); }
function fmtFull(n){ return n.toLocaleString('pt-BR'); }

function buildLineChart() {
  const labels = DATA.daily.map(d => d.date.slice(5));
  const datasets = [];
  if(activeMetrics.purchases) datasets.push({label:'Purchases',data:DATA.daily.map(d=>d.purchases),borderColor:'#7A53CA',backgroundColor:'rgba(122,83,202,.08)',borderWidth:2.5,pointRadius:3,pointHoverRadius:6,tension:.3,fill:true,yAxisID:'y'});
  if(activeMetrics.cliques) datasets.push({label:'Cliques',data:DATA.daily.map(d=>d.cliques),borderColor:'#6592FF',backgroundColor:'rgba(101,146,255,.05)',borderWidth:2,pointRadius:2,pointHoverRadius:5,tension:.3,fill:false,yAxisID:'y2'});
  if(activeMetrics.impressoes) datasets.push({label:'Impressões',data:DATA.daily.map(d=>d.impressoes),borderColor:'#72EAE1',backgroundColor:'rgba(114,234,225,.04)',borderWidth:2,pointRadius:2,pointHoverRadius:5,tension:.3,fill:false,yAxisID:'y3'});
  const ctx = document.getElementById('lineChart').getContext('2d');
  if(lineChart) lineChart.destroy();
  lineChart = new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels,datasets},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false},plugins:{legend:{display:true,labels:{font:{size:10,family:'Inter'},boxWidth:12,padding:16}},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'#17191C',titleFont:{family:'Inter',size:11},bodyFont:{family:'Inter',size:11},callbacks:{label:c=>` ${c.dataset.label}: ${fmtFull(c.parsed.y)}`}}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.04)'},ticks:{font:{size:10,family:'Inter'},color:'#696A6B',maxRotation:0}},y:{display:activeMetrics.purchases,position:'left',grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:10,family:'Inter'},color:'#7A53CA',callback:v=>fmt(v)}},y2:{display:false},y3:{display:false}}}});
}
function toggleMetric(m,btn){
  activeMetrics[m]=!activeMetrics[m];
  const cls=`active-${m}`;
  activeMetrics[m]?btn.classList.add(cls):btn.classList.remove(cls);
  buildLineChart();
}

// BAR CHART
function buildBarChart(){
  const top8=DATA.top_creatives.slice(0,8);
  const labels=top8.map(c=>{ const n=c.name.replace(/\.(jpg|png|jpeg)/gi,''); return n.length>22?n.slice(0,22)+'…':n; });
  const ctx=document.getElementById('barChart').getContext('2d');
  const grad=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,220);
  grad.addColorStop(0,'#7A53CA'); grad.addColorStop(.5,'#6592FF'); grad.addColorStop(1,'#72EAE1');
  new Chart(ctx,{type:'bar',data:{labels,datasets:[{label:'Purchases',data:top8.map(c=>c.purchases),backgroundColor:grad,borderRadius:5,borderSkipped:false}]},options:{indexAxis:'y',responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'#17191C',titleFont:{family:'Inter',size:10},bodyFont:{family:'Inter',size:11},callbacks:{label:c=>` ${fmtFull(c.parsed.x)} purchases`}}},scales:{x:{grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.04)'},ticks:{font:{size:10,family:'Inter'},color:'#696A6B',callback:v=>fmt(v)}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:10,family:'Inter'},color:'#17191C'}}}}});
}

// TABLE
let currentSort={key:'purchases',dir:-1}, currentPage=0;
const PAGE_SIZE=10;
let filteredData=[...DATA.top_creatives];
const maxPurch=Math.max(...DATA.top_creatives.map(c=>c.purchases));

function getCVRBadge(cvr){
  if(cvr===0) return `<span class="badge badge-gray">N/D</span>`;
  if(cvr>200)  return `<span class="badge badge-violet">${cvr.toFixed(1)}%</span>`;
  if(cvr>=30)  return `<span class="badge badge-teal">${cvr.toFixed(1)}%</span>`;
  if(cvr>=10)  return `<span class="badge badge-blue">${cvr.toFixed(1)}%</span>`;
  return `<span class="badge badge-pink">${cvr.toFixed(1)}%</span>`;
}
function getCTRBadge(ctr){
  if(ctr>=10) return `<span class="badge badge-teal">${ctr.toFixed(2)}%</span>`;
  if(ctr>=2)  return `<span class="badge badge-blue">${ctr.toFixed(2)}%</span>`;
  return `<span class="badge badge-gray">${ctr.toFixed(2)}%</span>`;
}

function renderTable(){
  const tbody=document.getElementById('tableBody');
  const start=currentPage*PAGE_SIZE;
  const slice=filteredData.slice(start,start+PAGE_SIZE);
  tbody.innerHTML=slice.map((c,i)=>{
    const rank=start+i+1;
    const pct=maxPurch>0?(c.purchases/maxPurch*100).toFixed(1):0;
    const dimMatch=c.name.match(/(\d+[xX×]\d+)/);
    const dim=dimMatch?dimMatch[0]:'';
    const cleanName=c.name.replace(/\.(jpg|png|jpeg)/gi,'');
    const imgSrc=IMAGES[c.name]||null;
    const thumbHtml=imgSrc
      ? `<div class="thumb-wrap" onclick="openLightbox('${imgSrc.substring(0,30)}...' , '${cleanName.replace(/'/g,"\'")}')">
           <img src="${imgSrc}" alt="${cleanName}" loading="lazy" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openLightbox(this.src,'${cleanName.replace(/'/g,"\'")}')">
         </div>`
      : `<div class="thumb-wrap"><span class="thumb-placeholder">🖼</span></div>`;
    return `<tr>
      <td><div class="rank-dot ${rank<=3?'':'gray'}">${rank}</div></td>
      <td>
        <div class="thumb-cell">
          ${thumbHtml}
          <div>
            <div class="creative-name" title="${c.name}">${cleanName}</div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:3px">
              ${dim?`<span class="creative-dim">${dim}</span>`:''}
              ${!imgSrc?'<span class="no-img">sem imagem</span>':''}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </td>
      <td class="num-cell">${fmtFull(c.impressoes)}</td>
      <td class="num-cell">${fmtFull(c.cliques)}</td>
      <td class="num-cell">${fmtFull(c.instalacoes)}</td>
      <td class="num-cell"><strong>${fmtFull(c.purchases)}</strong></td>
      <td class="num-cell">${getCTRBadge(c.ctr)}</td>
      <td class="num-cell">${getCVRBadge(c.cvr)}</td>
      <td><div class="bar-wrap"><div class="bar-bg"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--rl-gray-dk);min-width:32px">${pct}%</span></div></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
  const total=filteredData.length;
  document.getElementById('pageInfo').textContent=`Exibindo ${start+1}–${Math.min(start+PAGE_SIZE,total)} de ${total} criativos`;
  document.getElementById('prevBtn').disabled=currentPage===0;
  document.getElementById('nextBtn').disabled=(start+PAGE_SIZE)>=total;
}

function sortTable(key){
  if(currentSort.key===key) currentSort.dir*=-1; else{currentSort.key=key;currentSort.dir=-1;}
  filteredData.sort((a,b)=>{ const va=typeof a[key]==='string'?a[key].toLowerCase():(a[key]||0); const vb=typeof b[key]==='string'?b[key].toLowerCase():(b[key]||0); return va<vb?currentSort.dir:va>vb?-currentSort.dir:0; });
  currentPage=0; renderTable();
}
function filterTable(){
  const q=document.getElementById('searchInput').value.toLowerCase();
  filteredData=DATA.top_creatives.filter(c=>c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q));
  currentPage=0; renderTable();
}
function changePage(dir){ currentPage+=dir; renderTable(); }

// INIT
buildLineChart(); buildBarChart(); renderTable();

// Fix lightbox thumb click — pass full src
document.getElementById('tableBody').addEventListener('click', e => {
  const img = e.target.closest('.thumb-wrap img');
  if(img){ openLightbox(img.src, img.alt); }
  const wrap = e.target.closest('.thumb-wrap');
  if(wrap && !img){ /* placeholder, do nothing */ }
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
